/-- Lemma 9. Knowledge of secrets is preserved. -/
lemma knowledge_of_secrets_is_preserved {a b : @Agent n}
    (hKv : SŌīłŽāŌīē ŌŖ¦ Kv a b) (hSub : Žā ŌŖæ Žä) : SŌīłŽäŌīē ŌŖ¦ Kv a b := by
  unfold eval eval eval at hKv
  rw [ŌåÉ or_iff_not_and_not] at hKv
  unfold eval eval eval
  rw [ŌåÉ or_iff_not_and_not]
  rcases hKv with (h|h)
  ┬Ę left
    exact @knowledge_of_secrets_is_preserved' n S Žā Žä a b true h hSub
  ┬Ę right
    exact @knowledge_of_secrets_is_preserved' n S Žā Žä a b false h hSub

/-- Lemma 10. Agents know their own value. Follows from `stubbornness`. -/

    simp_rw [stubbornness]
    intro T Ō¤©Žä, same_lenŌ¤® equ

    unfold eval
    simp_rw [stubbornness]
    intro T Ō¤©Žä, same_lenŌ¤® equ
    rw [know_self _ _ _ _ _ equ] at h
